setup.subtitle: Complete the four steps to create your plan.

step1.title: Certification Details
step1.description: Which certification or licence are you tracking?

step2.title: Reporting & Credit Setup
step2.description: Your reporting period and credit totals

step3.title: Category Breakdown
step3.description: Split credits across categories, if any.

fields.initialCompletedHint: Baseline before LoopsKey tracking. Recorded activities are added on top.
fields.deadlineRemindersHint: Optional — stay ahead of your deadline.

categories.empty: No categories yet. Add one if your certification splits credits across categories.

unsaved.title: Discard changes?
unsaved.description: You have unsaved changes. Leaving now will discard this plan setup.

complianceHint.IN_PROGRESS: You are making progress toward your goal.
complianceHint.ON_TRACK: You are on pace to meet your requirement.
complianceHint.AT_RISK: You are behind the expected pace.
complianceHint.REQUIREMENTS_COMPLETED: All credits and categories are met.
complianceHint.EVIDENCE_INCOMPLETE: Requirements met, but some evidence is missing.

missing.MISSING_EVIDENCE: {{detail}} completed activities are missing required evidence.
missing.MISSING_REPORT_RECIPIENT: Add a report recipient to complete your plan.
missing.DEADLINE_APPROACHING: Your reporting deadline is in {{detail}} days.
missing.REPORTING_NOT_STARTED: The reporting period has not started yet.

progress.missingSubtitle: What to do to stay compliant
progress.missingNone: You have met all requirements. Great work!

validation.positive: Value must be greater than zero.
validation.endBeforeStart: End date must not be before the start date.
validation.completedOverTotal: Completed credits cannot exceed the total required.
validation.categoryTotalOverTotal: Category targets exceed the total required credits.
validation.evidenceRequired: Select at least one evidence type.

duplicate.title: Possible duplicate plan
duplicate.description: You already have a plan for this certification and reporting period. Create it anyway?

delete.title: Delete this plan?
delete.description: This permanently removes the plan and its categories. Your learning activities are not affected.

hero.description: LoopsKey helps professionals, organizations, and content providers discover the right learning opportunities, build AI-powered development roadmaps, manage CPD compliance, and turn professional growth into a measurable system.
hero.visualAlt: Professional learning roadmap and services overview

value.title: A smarter way to connect learning, compliance, and career progress
value.description: Instead of treating events, courses, certificates, and organizational training as separate tools, LoopsKey connects them into one intelligent professional development experience.

personalized.title: Personalized by goal
personalized.description: Recommendations are matched to each professional’s role, interests, goals, CPD needs, and preferred learning format.

compliance.title: Built for CPD compliance
compliance.description: Professionals and organizations can track required hours, certificates, evidence, reports, and progress toward compliance targets.

automation.title: Less manual work
automation.description: AI-assisted discovery, reminders, roadmaps, and reports reduce repetitive search and administrative effort.

ecosystem.title: For the full ecosystem
ecosystem.description: LoopsKey supports individual professionals, providers, enterprises, associations, and organizations from one connected platform.

services.title: Tailored services for professionals, organizations, and providers
services.description: Each service is designed to solve a specific part of the professional development journey while staying connected to the wider LoopsKey platform.

discovery.title: AI-Powered Event Discovery
discovery.description: Stop scrolling through fragmented event listings. LoopsKey surfaces the right conferences, webinars, workshops, and learning opportunities as soon as they appear.

benefits.0: Personalized event feed across multiple providers
benefits.1: Smart filters for CPD points, format, budget, and location
benefits.2: Calendar sync, saved events, and automatic reminders
benefits.3: Discovery of niche and hidden-gem professional events
benefits.4: AI-explained relevance for every recommended opportunity

roadmaps.title: Personalized Learning Roadmaps
roadmaps.description: Turn vague career goals into structured learning steps. LoopsKey helps professionals move from where they are today to the skills, roles, and certifications they want next.

benefits.0: Goal-driven sequencing of courses, events, and milestones
benefits.1: Dynamic re-planning as interests, roles, or goals change
benefits.2: Time, budget, and CPD-aware learning recommendations
benefits.3: Integrated milestones, deadlines, and progress tracking
benefits.4: Suggested next steps based on career direction and skill gaps

cpd.title: CPD & Certification Management
cpd.description: LoopsKey simplifies CPD tracking by centralizing learning records, certificates, professional development hours, and evidence in one audit-ready space.

benefits.0: Auto-tracked CPD hours, points, and learning progress
benefits.2: Flexible support for professional frameworks and categories
benefits.3: One-click compliance reports for professionals and organizations
benefits.4: Audit-ready learning history and evidence trails

workforce.title: Organization Workforce Solutions
workforce.description: Give HR, L&D, compliance teams, and leadership a clear view of workforce learning, CPD progress, department performance, and assignment completion.

benefits.0: Real-time member, department, CPD, and compliance dashboards
benefits.1: Assign learning paths, courses, and events at scale
benefits.2: Skill-gap analysis, compliance risk visibility, and reporting
benefits.3: Department-based member management and assignment tracking
benefits.4: Custom settings for compliance cycles, alerts, and required PDU hours

providers.title: Content Provider Promotion & Analytics
providers.description: Help training providers, event organizers, and professional education companies reach the right audience and understand what drives registrations.

benefits.0: Promote events and courses to matched professional audiences
benefits.1: Track registrations, views, conversion, and event performance
benefits.2: Request featured listings, email campaigns, and social boosts
benefits.3: Understand demand by role, category, format, and audience interest
benefits.4: Recurring exposure through AI recommendations and saved roadmaps

cta.title: Let’s design the right professional growth solution for your needs
cta.description: Whether you are building your career, managing a workforce, or promoting learning content, we can help you map the right LoopsKey solution.

hero.titleStart: We are building the operating system for
hero.description: LoopsKey helps professionals, organizations, and content providers turn continuous development into a smarter, simpler, and measurable journey.

story.title: Built by people who lived the problem
story.paragraphOne: After 15 years as a chartered engineer, our founder watched colleagues drown in CPD paperwork while struggling to find training that actually moved their careers forward. The tools existed — they just didn't talk to each other.
story.paragraphTwo: LoopsKey began as a weekend project to organize one engineer's learning journey. Today it's an AI platform serving tens of thousands of professionals and the organizations that invest in them.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: To make continuous professional development effortless, intelligent, and accessible to every working professional on earth.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: A world where careers compound — where every learning hour is purposeful and every skill is recognized.

intelligence.title: Intelligence first
intelligence.description: We use AI to remove busywork, not to replace human judgment.

learner.title: Learner obsessed
learner.description: Every decision starts with the professional whose career we serve.

trust.title: Trust by default
trust.description: Privacy, security, and transparent data are non-negotiable.

growth.title: Lifelong growth
growth.description: Careers don't end at graduation — we build for decades of learning.

idea.title: The idea
idea.description: Founded after seeing engineers struggle to manage CPD across dozens of providers.

roadmap.title: First AI roadmap
roadmap.description: Launched personalized learning paths to a beta of 500 professionals.

enterprise.title: Enterprise launch
enterprise.description: Onboarded our first global organizations and content partners.

items.question: How does LoopsKey track my CPD hours?
items.answer: LoopsKey logs time spent on courses, events, webinars, and reading activities automatically when they are completed through the platform. You can also add manual entries, upload evidence, and generate reports mapped to your professional framework.

items.question: Which CPD frameworks do you support?
items.answer: LoopsKey supports frameworks such as IEEE, PMI, RICS, Engineering Council, CIPD, and many others. Organizations can also configure custom CPD rules, categories, minimum hours, and reporting cycles.

items.question: Can I add CPD activities manually?
items.answer: Yes. You can manually add external training, conferences, mentoring, reading, volunteering, or professional activities. Each entry can include hours, notes, category, evidence files, and completion dates.

items.question: Can I export CPD reports?
items.answer: Yes. You can export CPD reports for personal records, employer reviews, audits, or professional associations. Reports include completed hours, evidence, certificates, categories, and compliance progress.

items.question: How accurate are the AI recommendations?
items.answer: LoopsKey combines your goals, role, interests, past learning, CPD requirements, and industry signals. Every recommendation includes transparent reasoning so you can understand why a course, event, or roadmap step was suggested.

items.question: Can I override the AI suggestions?
items.answer: Always. LoopsKey is designed as a co-pilot, not autopilot. You can edit your roadmap, remove recommendations, add your own goals, and tell the system what to prioritize.

items.question: Does LoopsKey use my private data to train public AI models?
items.answer: No. Your private learning records, certificates, organization data, and professional history are not used to train public AI models. AI features are designed with privacy and enterprise data boundaries in mind.

items.question: Can I see why something was recommended?
items.answer: Yes. Recommendations include explanation signals such as skill relevance, CPD value, career goal alignment, format preference, budget fit, and timing.

items.question: Do you offer SSO and SCIM?
items.answer: Yes. SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, and HRIS integrations are available for Business and Enterprise plans. These options help organizations manage users, roles, and access securely at scale.

items.question: How long does enterprise rollout take?
items.answer: Most organizations can go live within two weeks, depending on SSO, data import, branding, and reporting requirements. Larger rollouts may include a phased onboarding plan.

items.question: What can organizations track?
items.answer: Organizations can track members, departments, assignments, CPD progress, compliance status, PDU totals, at-risk professionals, completion rates, and workforce learning trends.

items.question: Can managers assign courses or events to employees?
items.answer: Yes. Organization admins can assign courses or events to all members, specific departments, roles, or individual professionals. Progress and completion can be tracked from the dashboard.

items.question: How do I list my courses on LoopsKey?
items.answer: Providers can apply through the partner program. Approved providers receive access to a provider dashboard where they can publish, update, promote, and analyze their courses and events.

items.question: What analytics do providers get?
items.answer: Providers can track impressions, registrations, completion signals, learner interest, conversion rates, event performance, promotion requests, and recurring exposure through AI recommendations.

items.question: Can providers promote events or courses?
items.answer: Yes. Providers can request featured listings, email campaigns, social media boosts, or combo promotion packages depending on availability and plan.

items.question: Are providers reviewed before publishing?
items.answer: Yes. LoopsKey reviews providers to help maintain quality, relevance, and trust for professionals and organizations using the platform.

items.question: Can I store my certificates in LoopsKey?
items.answer: Yes. You can upload certificates, store evidence, connect them to CPD activities, and share them securely when needed.

items.question: Are certificates shareable or verifiable?
items.answer: Certificates can be shared through secure links when enabled. Organizations can also review evidence for compliance and audit workflows.

items.question: Can LoopsKey track certificate expiry dates?
items.answer: Yes. Expiry dates, renewal reminders, evidence requirements, and related learning suggestions can be tracked to help you stay compliant.

items.question: How is my data protected?
items.answer: Data is protected with secure authentication, encrypted transmission, role-based access, and privacy-first controls. Enterprise customers can request additional security and hosting options.

items.question: Is LoopsKey GDPR compliant?
items.answer: LoopsKey is designed with GDPR principles in mind, including data minimization, access control, consent-aware workflows, and support for data access or deletion requests.

items.question: How does role-based access work?
items.answer: Access is separated by role. Professionals, providers, organizations, and admins each receive dashboards and permissions aligned with their responsibilities.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. Individuals can use core roadmap and CPD features for free. Premium AI, advanced reporting, integrations, and organization features are available on paid plans.

items.question: Do you have a mobile app?
items.answer: Mobile access is part of the product roadmap. The web platform is responsive and designed to work smoothly across desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers.

items.question: Can I sync events with my calendar?
items.answer: Yes. Calendar integration helps you track upcoming learning events, deadlines, reminders, and roadmap milestones.

items.question: How do I get support?
items.answer: You can contact the LoopsKey team through the contact page. Organization and provider customers may also receive onboarding and account support depending on their plan.

hero.title: Your data,
hero.description: Learn how LoopsKey collects, uses, shares, and protects information across learning roadmaps, CPD tracking, event discovery, and workforce development tools.

nav.title: Policy sections
nav.description: Jump to any part of the privacy policy.

contactCard.title: Privacy questions?
contactCard.description: Our privacy team can help with data access, deletion, exports, or policy questions.

cta.title: Contact our Data Protection Officer
cta.description: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data rights, contact the LoopsKey privacy team.

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: At LoopsKey, we believe trust is earned. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect information when you use our AI-powered professional development platform — including learning roadmaps, CPD tracking, event discovery, and workforce development tools.
By using LoopsKey, you agree to the practices described here. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: Information We Collect
paragraphs: We collect information in three ways:
bullets: Information you provide — name, email, professional profile, CPD records, learning goals, and content you upload.
Information collected automatically — device, browser, IP address, usage events, and interactions with recommendations.
Information from partners — course providers, employers, and identity providers such as Google or LinkedIn when you connect them.

infoCard.title: Minimum necessary principle
infoCard.text: We only collect what is needed to deliver and improve your experience. You can review and export your data at any time.

sections.title: How We Use Information
paragraphs: We use your information to:
bullets: Operate, maintain, and personalize the LoopsKey platform.
Generate AI-powered learning roadmaps and recommendations.
Track CPD progress and produce reports for you or your organization.
Communicate updates, security alerts, and product news. You can opt out of marketing messages.
Detect, prevent, and respond to fraud, abuse, or security incidents.

sections.title: AI & Recommendation Services
paragraphs: LoopsKey uses machine learning to recommend courses, events, and learning paths. These systems analyze your stated goals, role, skills, and engagement signals to surface the most relevant content.
You can adjust recommendation preferences or disable personalized suggestions in your account settings at any time.

infoCard.title: No training on private content
infoCard.text: Your private CPD records, journal entries, and uploaded files are never used to train third-party foundation models.

sections.title: Data Sharing
paragraphs: We share information only in limited circumstances:
We never sell your personal information to advertisers or data brokers.
bullets: With your employer or association when you join through their workspace — limited to CPD progress and approved fields.
With trusted service providers such as hosting, analytics, and email vendors under strict data processing agreements.
For legal reasons when required by law, subpoena, or to protect the rights and safety of users.

sections.title: Security
paragraphs: We use industry-standard safeguards including encryption in transit, encryption at rest, least-privilege access controls, continuous monitoring, and routine security testing.

infoCard.title: Compliance & certifications
infoCard.text: LoopsKey aligns with SOC 2, GDPR, and UK Data Protection requirements. Our infrastructure partners are certified to ISO 27001.

sections.title: Cookies & Analytics
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember preferences, and understand how the platform is used. You can control cookies through your browser or via our cookie banner. Analytics data is aggregated and de-identified.

sections.title: User Rights
paragraphs: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
bullets: Access, correct, or delete your personal information.
Export a copy of your data in a portable format.
Object to or restrict certain processing activities.
Withdraw consent and close your account at any time.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
paragraphs: LoopsKey links to third-party courses, events, and providers. We do not control those sites and are not responsible for their privacy practices. Please review their policies before sharing information.

sections.title: Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain personal data only as long as needed for the purposes described here, to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements. When data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymized.

sections.title: Contact Information
paragraphs: For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact our Data Protection Officer:

contactItems.label: Mail
contactItems.value: LoopsKey Privacy Team, 1 Innovation Way, London, UK

hero.title: Rules for using
hero.description: These Terms explain how you may access and use LoopsKey, including AI-powered roadmaps, CPD tracking, event discovery, and workforce development tools.

nav.title: Terms sections
nav.description: Jump to any section of the Terms of Service.

contactCard.title: Legal questions?
contactCard.description: For questions about these Terms, contact the LoopsKey legal team.

cta.title: Talk to us before you proceed
cta.description: If you are evaluating LoopsKey for your team, organization, or provider business, we can help explain the terms that apply to your use case.

sections.title: Overview of Services
paragraphs: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of LoopsKey, an AI-powered professional development platform offering learning roadmaps, CPD tracking, event discovery, and workforce development tools.
By creating an account or using LoopsKey, you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: User Accounts
paragraphs: You must provide accurate information when creating an account, keep your credentials confidential, and notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
You must be at least 16 years old, or the age of digital consent in your country, to use LoopsKey.

sections.title: Third-Party Events & Content
paragraphs: LoopsKey aggregates courses, events, and resources from third-party providers. We do not author or guarantee the accuracy, quality, or availability of third-party content.

notice.title: Independent providers
notice.text: Purchases, registrations, and certificates are governed by the third-party provider's own terms. LoopsKey is not a party to those transactions.

sections.title: AI-Generated Recommendations
paragraphs: Our AI features generate personalized roadmaps, course suggestions, and insights based on your profile and goals. These recommendations are informational and should not be treated as professional, legal, medical, or financial advice.

notice.title: Use your judgment
notice.text: AI outputs may occasionally be incomplete or inaccurate. Always verify critical information before acting on it.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: LoopsKey, its logo, software, and platform content are owned by LoopsKey Ltd. and protected by intellectual property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the platform for its intended purpose. You may not copy, reverse engineer, or redistribute our software.

sections.title: User Content
paragraphs: You retain ownership of any content you upload, including notes, CPD records, and certificates. By uploading content, you grant LoopsKey a limited license to host, display, and process that content solely to provide the service.
You are responsible for ensuring you have the rights to share any content you upload.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
paragraphs: You agree not to:
bullets: Use the platform for unlawful, harmful, or fraudulent purposes.
Upload malware, scrape data, or attempt to bypass security measures.
Impersonate others or misrepresent your professional credentials.
Resell, sublicense, or use the platform to build a competing product.

sections.title: Subscription & Payments
paragraphs: Paid plans are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You can cancel at any time; cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle. Fees are non-refundable except where required by law.
We may change pricing with at least 30 days' advance notice.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, LoopsKey and its affiliates will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, or goodwill arising from your use of the platform.
Our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid LoopsKey in the twelve months before the event giving rise to the claim.

sections.title: Platform Availability
paragraphs: We strive for high availability but do not guarantee that the platform will be uninterrupted or error-free. We may suspend the service for scheduled maintenance, security incidents, or circumstances beyond our control.

sections.title: Account Termination
paragraphs: You may close your account at any time from your settings. We may suspend or terminate your account if you breach these Terms, misuse the platform, or fail to pay applicable fees.
On termination, your right to use the platform ends immediately, but data export remains available for 30 days.

sections.title: Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of London, UK, unless local consumer protection laws require otherwise.

sections.title: Contact Information
paragraphs: For questions about these Terms, contact us:

contactItems.label: Mail
contactItems.value: LoopsKey Legal Team, 1 Innovation Way, London, UK

newFeature.ctaText: Choose from various learning paths curated by industry experts. Whether you're starting from scratch or advancing your skills, our roadmaps guide you every step of the way.

structured.title: Structured Progress
structured.text: Clear, step-by-step learning paths designed by industry experts.

community.title: Community Driven
community.text: Learn alongside others following the same path and share experiences.

progress.title: Track Progress
progress.text: Monitor your advancement and celebrate milestones along the way.

services.title: Everything you need for professional development
services.subtitle: LoopsKey brings learning discovery, CPD tracking, provider tools, recommendations, and analytics into one intelligent platform.

cpdManagement.title: CPD Management
cpdManagement.text: Stay in the loop with your profession by seamlessly managing your Continuous Professional Development (CPD). Track your progress, plan future learning, and stay ahead with ease.

contentAggregation.title: Learning Content Aggregation
contentAggregation.text: Discover global learning opportunities effortlessly. Our AI aggregates webinars, seminars, and expert sessions, giving you access to diverse professional content in one place.

personalizedDashboard.title: Personalized Dashboard
personalizedDashboard.text: Access a tailored dashboard that highlights upcoming events, registered courses, and personalized recommendations aligned with your career goals.

professionalsConnection.title: Professionals Connection
professionalsConnection.text: Expand your horizons by connecting with top-tier training and development opportunities worldwide, regardless of location or affiliation.

recommendations.title: Intelligent Recommendations
recommendations.text: Leverage AI-driven tagging and advanced search to receive intelligent, personalized recommendations that match your expertise and interests.

providerSolutions.title: Content Provider Solutions
providerSolutions.text: Unlock new opportunities as a content provider. Share your webinars, courses, and events with a global network of professionals seeking continuous education.

hrAssociations.title: HR and Professional Associations
hrAssociations.text: Empower your workforce with accredited training opportunities. Streamline professional development and keep skills competitive in a fast-changing world.

dataAnalytics.title: Data Analytics
dataAnalytics.text: Gain actionable insights with LoopsKey analytics. Track learning trends, assess needs, and make data-driven decisions to stay ahead of the curve.

roadmapShowcase.title: Turn career goals into a living
roadmapShowcase.description: LoopsKey turns your goals into a living roadmap — sequencing courses, events, and certifications in the right order with milestones you can actually hit.

benefits.adaptiveRoadmap: Adapts as your role and skills evolve

organization.title: Build a workforce that compounds
organization.description: Give every team member a personalized roadmap, prove CPD compliance in one click, and turn learning into measurable business outcomes.

provider.title: Reach professionals actively learning
provider.description: Training companies, associations, and educators trust LoopsKey to put their best content in front of motivated learners.

promoteEvents.title: Promote your events
promoteEvents.description: List courses, conferences, and webinars to a global audience of qualified professionals.

reachPeople.title: Reach the right people
reachPeople.description: AI matches your offerings to learners actively building roadmaps in your domain.

analytics.title: Real-time analytics
analytics.description: Track impressions, registrations, and learner engagement with a clean dashboard.

growAudience.title: Grow your audience
growAudience.description: Build a following of returning learners and convert one-off attendees into a community.

dashboard.title: Professional learning marketplace
dashboard.funnelDescription: Monitor how your content moves from discovery to registration.
dashboard.matchingDescription: Your events appear where professionals are already planning their next step.
dashboard.analyticsDescription: Understand views, interest, registrations, and content momentum in one place.

testimonials.title: Trusted across the industry
testimonials.description: From individual engineers to global organizations and training providers.

engineer.quote: LoopsKey replaced four spreadsheets and a dozen browser tabs. My CPD is finally on autopilot — and I'm learning the right things.
engineer.name: Daniel Park

organization.quote: We deployed across 1,800 engineers. CPD compliance jumped from 61% to 94% in one quarter and L&D finally has the analytics it needed.
organization.name: Maria Gonzalez

provider.quote: Listing our certification programs on LoopsKey 4x'd qualified registrations. The audience is precisely who we want.
provider.name: Aisha Nour
provider.role: Director of Programs · Global PM Institute

notFound.title: This page seems to be off the learning path
notFound.description: The page you are looking for may have been moved, renamed, or is no longer available.
notFound.supportText: Tell us what you were trying to find.

common.comingSoon: This section is ready for API integration and UI completion.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Keep your professional profile complete and up to date. Each section saves on its own.

interests.title: Your interest tags
interests.description: Built from the favourite subjects saved in Skills & Interests.
interests.empty: You have not selected any favourite subjects yet.

avatar.hint: JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to {{size}} MB.

basic.emailUnverified: This email address is not verified yet.

details.workLocationHint: For example London, United Kingdom or Remote.

skills.description: Choose the skills you rely on today and the subjects you want to learn.

overview.title: Welcome back, {name}! 👋
overview.description: Here’s what’s happening with your learning journey today.
overview.pduOverTimeDescription: Monthly accumulation of your approved professional development units.
overview.learningSnapshotText: Your one-stop platform for all educational needs. Discover, learn, and grow with LoopsKey.
overview.emptyActiveCourses: You do not have any active courses yet.
overview.recommendedCoursesDescription: Curated based on your learning behavior and professional growth path.
overview.recommendationsEmptyDescription: Explore the catalog to discover courses tailored to your growth.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Personalize your LoopsKey experience: language, theme, notifications and profile visibility.

general.description: Customize the language for your dashboard.
general.languageHint: Choose the language used across your dashboard.
general.note: These settings affect only your personal dashboard experience.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how LoopsKey keeps you informed about important updates.

notifications.pushNotificationsDescription: Allow in-browser or in-app notifications for key events.
notifications.courseUpdatesDescription: Get notified when your enrolled courses are updated.
notifications.messagesDescription: Alerts for new messages from providers or admins.
notifications.eventRemindersDescription: Reminders for upcoming sessions, deadlines and events.
notifications.loginAlertsDescription: Get notified when a new login is detected on your account.

privacy.title: Profile & Privacy
privacy.description: Control what others can see on your public LoopsKey profile.

privacy.privateDescription: Only you can see your full profile.
privacy.showEmailDescription: Allow collaborators to contact you directly.
privacy.showCertificatesDescription: Allow others to view your verified certificates.

security.description: Manage your password, email and account protection.

wishlist.description: Manage courses, events, podcasts and videos you saved for later.
wishlist.emptyDescription: Save courses, events and learning materials to quickly access them from here.

review.subtitle: Check everything below, then add your activity.

targetsDialog.description: Set a target for a specific CPD/PDU category and year. Saving updates the existing target for that category rather than adding a duplicate.

targetsDialog.existingHint: Current target: {{target}} PDUs. Saving will replace it.

payments.title: Billing & Payments
payments.subtitle: Review your payment history, billing activity and premium learning purchases.

payments.savedMethodsDesc: Derived automatically from your successful payments.
payments.noMethodsDesc: Once you complete a payment, saved methods and billing details will appear here.
payments.historyDescription: All your past successful payments and billing records.
payments.emptyDescription: Your transactions will appear here after you enroll in paid learning experiences.

certificates.subtitle: View, download, verify and share your earned professional certificates.

courses.description: Track your learning progress, continue active courses, and review completed learning.
courses.progressDescription: Continue where you left off and monitor your learning journey.
courses.emptyDescription: Browse courses and enroll to start your learning journey.

roadmap.title: Your learning roadmaps
roadmap.subtitle: Track your structured learning paths, monitor phase progress, and explore new professional development journeys.
roadmap.learningPathDescription: Your roadmap phases will appear here once you enroll in a roadmap.
roadmap.noLearningPathDescription: Enroll in a roadmap to see your structured phases and progress here.
roadmap.phaseDescriptionFallback: Continue this phase to move forward in your professional development path.

roadmap.exploreRoadmapsDescription: Discover new professional learning paths tailored to your growth goals.
